# coldemail.club

> Cold email copywriting as a service. We write cold email sequences that boost open rates and get more replies, so B2B founders, sales teams, and outbound agencies can crush their outbound sales goals.

## What we do

coldemail.club is a productized service that delivers done-for-you cold email copy. Each engagement includes:

- Discovery call to learn your business, ICP, and campaign goals
- Custom 4–6 email sequence written from scratch (subject lines + body + follow-ups)
- A/B variant subject lines and opening hooks
- Unlimited revisions until the copy performs
- Setup help inside your sending tool of choice (Instantly, Smartlead, Lemlist, Apollo, Lemlist)
- Deliverability review (SPF, DKIM, DMARC, warmup, domain reputation)
- Full IP ownership transferred to the client on delivery

## Who it is for

- B2B SaaS founders running outbound themselves
- Outbound agencies and lead-gen shops who want copy expertise on tap
- Sales teams whose SDRs are writing their own templates
- Recruiters running candidate outreach
- Anyone whose cold email reply rate is lower than they want

## Process

1. **Discovery & Strategy** — Understand your offer, audience, and outcome you want from the campaign.
2. **Custom Sequence** — Write the full email sequence designed for open and reply rates.
3. **Launch & Optimize** — Help set up the campaign, A/B test variants, and revise until results land.

## Free tools

- [Spam Score Checker](https://coldemail.club/tools/spam-score-checker/) — paste a cold email, get an instant 0–100 spam score, flagged phrases, and structural fixes. 100% client-side, no signup.
- Subject Line Generator (coming soon)
- Cold Email Template Library (coming soon)
- Reply Rate Predictor (coming soon)
- Deliverability Audit (coming soon)
- Personalization Snippet Generator (coming soon)

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://coldemail.club/): Service overview, process, benefits, FAQ.
- [Free tools hub](https://coldemail.club/tools/): All free cold-email tools.
- [Spam Score Checker](https://coldemail.club/tools/spam-score-checker/): Free tool to audit a single cold email for spam triggers.

## How to engage

Book a free 20-minute discovery call at [coldemail.club/#book](https://coldemail.club/#book). No pitch, no pressure — we audit your current outbound and outline what to fix first. Free email audits are also available without a call.
